title: AYETASKS
description: Everything is a task — build your own hierarchy up to 25 levels deep, with polymorphic due dates (exact, scoped, recurring) and color-coded tagging, all from a native iOS app.
shortDescription: Infinite-depth task hierarchy with polymorphic scheduling for iOS
details: Task management system built on the principle that everything is a task. The native iOS app (Swift, MVVM) pairs with a Python backend (FastAPI + MongoDB Atlas via Beanie ODM) supporting up to 25 levels of nested hierarchy with a flat-query + app-level tree-building strategy for O(n) performance. Features a polymorphic due-date system (no date, exact datetime, ISO 8601 scoped periods, and recurring intervals), hex-colour tagging, JWT authentication, and children promotion on delete to preserve data. Full stack orchestrated with Docker Compose.

title: AYERECIPES
description: Capture recipes with your camera, manage ingredients and steps, and store images in the cloud — a native iOS app with presigned S3 uploads, haptic feedback, and two-tier image caching.
shortDescription: iOS recipe manager with camera capture and S3 cloud storage
details: Native iOS recipe app (SwiftUI, MVVM) with camera and photo-library integration, JPEG compression, and CoreHaptics feedback. The FastAPI backend uses presigned S3 URLs for direct client-to-cloud image uploads (10-min PUT, 24-hour GET), MongoDB Atlas for data, and JWT authentication. The iOS client features a two-tier image cache (memory + disk via NSCache) with controlled concurrency (max 4 simultaneous downloads). Containerized with Docker for consistent deployment.

title: AYEGIRLFRIEND
description: Never forget a thoughtful gesture — track care ideas, plan actions, and log relationship moments from a native iOS app backed by an async FastAPI + MongoDB API.
shortDescription: Relationship care tracker for iOS with async Python backend
details: Relationship care management app designed to help users track thoughtful ideas, plan actions, and log care activities for their partners. The async Python backend (FastAPI + Motor) connects to MongoDB Atlas with three core collections — partners, ideas, and action logs. Built with an async-first architecture using Motor for non-blocking database operations and structured test cases (pytest + mongomock-motor) for isolated testing.

title: AYESTOCK
description: Add products, track stock levels, and search inventory instantly — a bilingual Next.js dashboard with dark mode, async MongoDB queries, and a clean FastAPI REST API.
shortDescription: Bilingual inventory dashboard with dark mode and async search
details: Bilingual (EN/ES) inventory management system with dark mode support. The Next.js 16 frontend provides a responsive dashboard with product creation forms, real-time table displays with color-coded status badges, and regex-powered search. The async Python backend (FastAPI + Motor) exposes a REST API for product CRUD, tracking quantity, buy/sell prices, categories, and active status. Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, dark-mode-ready interface.

title: AYEMUSICVISUALIZER
description: Drag, drop, and customize frequency bars that pulse to live audio — a macOS visualizer with per-bar FFT targeting, color interpolation, and interactive positioning.
shortDescription: Interactive macOS audio visualizer with draggable frequency bars
details: Native macOS application (SwiftUI) that captures live audio via AVAudioEngine and drives real-time, interactive frequency-bar visualizations. Each bar independently targets a frequency (60 Hz–16 kHz) with ±50 Hz bandwidth averaging, is freely draggable on screen, and features smooth color interpolation between low- and high-volume states. Uses Accelerate's vDSP for 2048-sample FFT with a pre-calculated Hann window, reusable buffers, and exponential smoothing (factor 0.3) for jitter-free animation. Includes 9 musical-frequency presets and a toggleable control panel for full-screen immersion.

title: AYECLICKER
description: A lightweight macOS menu-bar tool for defining global hotkeys and automating click sequences — precision control at your fingertips.
shortDescription: macOS automation utility with global hotkeys
details: Lightweight macOS menu-bar application built with Swift and AppKit. Allows users to define system-wide hotkeys and configure automated click sequences, demonstrating low-level event handling and macOS accessibility APIs.

title: FATIMA RESENDIZ
description: A complete photography business platform — bilingual portfolio with drag-and-drop canvas, client portal with Pic-Time gallery access, lead pipeline CRM, and Brevo email automation.
shortDescription: Photography CRM + portfolio with lead pipeline and gallery delivery
details: Multi-platform system built for a professional photographer. The bilingual (EN/ES) Next.js 15 public site features a drag-and-drop canvas homepage editor, wedding and seasonal portfolio galleries, and a lead capture form with rate limiting. The client portal provides JWT-authenticated access to Pic-Time galleries with invite-based onboarding and refresh-token rotation for mobile. A full admin dashboard tracks clients, sessions, leads (new → contacted → booked → closed), and testimonials with moderation. The FastAPI + MongoDB backend (Beanie ODM) integrates Brevo for automated email marketing — confirmation to prospects and notifications to the photographer. Deployed with Docker on Railway.

title: BLINDY
description: Enterprise hybrid app with biometric login, Stripe payments, live notifications, and Google Maps — serving a real professional services business on iOS and Android.
shortDescription: Enterprise hybrid app with payments, maps, and real-time updates
details: Enterprise-grade hybrid mobile application (iOS + Android) built with Ionic/Angular and Capacitor. Integrates biometric authentication (fingerprint/Face ID), Stripe payment processing, Google Maps, Firebase push notifications and real-time updates via SignalR. The backend is a .NET 4.7 ASP.NET Web API with Entity Framework and SQL Server.

title: MEDISCANN
description: Snap a photo, get a diagnosis — cross-platform app that classifies skin conditions in real time using a custom-trained MobileNetV2 neural network.
shortDescription: AI skin-condition detector powered by MobileNetV2
details: A comprehensive system composed of a React Native mobile client (Expo), a React web dashboard for administration, and a Python-based AI backend. The core features a convolutional neural network (MobileNetV2) exposed via a REST API (Flask/FastAPI) to classify dermatological conditions from user images in real-time. The entire architecture is containerised and orchestrated using Docker Compose.
